summary.fixtureDisclosure: Three original text-only preview Song Cards. No private lyrics, source audio, stems, or full song roster are bundled.

songCards.title: Red Signal
songCards.author: Calder
songCards.learningThing: Urgency becomes useful when it names a return path.
songCards.broadGameMechanic: Action with rollback and repair ownership.

lore.summary: Red sends a bounded signal into a sleeping field and leaves the way home illuminated.

lyrics.text:
Light the edge, but leave the doorway clear.
Name the move, the hand, the cost, the fear.
If the signal bends, we turn it toward repair.
Red goes first, but never goes alone.

authorship.author: Calder
authorship.albumAttributionRule: Attribute the Echo State public demo to Calder.
authorship.singerPerspectiveRule: Avatar perspective does not change authorship.

mediaPrompts.prompt: A red pulse crossing a dark geometric forest, with a clearly illuminated return path; no text.

songCards.title: Blue Return
songCards.author: Calder
songCards.learningThing: A trace is valuable when it preserves uncertainty and a route home.

lore.summary: Blue follows a signal through shifting mirrors and returns with the unknowns still honestly marked.

lyrics.text:
Thread the source through every changing frame.
Keep the missing pieces missing, keep their names.
A perfect map is not the living shore.
Blue comes back and leaves an open door.

authorship.author: Calder
authorship.albumAttributionRule: Attribute the Echo State public demo to Calder.
authorship.singerPerspectiveRule: Avatar perspective does not change authorship.

mediaPrompts.prompt: A blue route of light returning through mirrored gates, every junction visibly traced; no text.

songCards.title: Green Horizon
songCards.author: Calder
songCards.learningThing: Care becomes operational when cost, consent, and repair have names.

lore.summary: Green gathers the red pulse and blue trace into a horizon wide enough for every named traveler.

lyrics.text:
Bring the cost into the circle of the light.
Name the ones who carry morning through the night.
Care can choose and still remain aware.
Green makes room, then gives the choice a chair.

authorship.author: Calder
authorship.albumAttributionRule: Attribute the Echo State public demo to Calder.
authorship.singerPerspectiveRule: Avatar perspective does not change authorship.

mediaPrompts.prompt: A green horizon joining red and blue signal paths around a shared circular table; no text.
